title: M'challa Order
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''M'challa Order''' were a group of scholars who wore robes. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] and [[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] disguised themselves as members of the order to infiltrate [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion's]] [[Imperial Remnant|Imperial]] library.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{Mo}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
